creator: mi+thun@aldan.algebra.com
text:
To spare ourselves the agony of repo-copying, I'm going to upgrade the 
print/lyx straight to 1.6.x leaving print/lyx15 to track 1.5.x

Both need to wait for TeXLive to be incorporated in the tree, however. 
That's what LyX developers use now and the new LyX finds teTeX inadequate.

    -mi
